    Vendor - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes
    Represents a vendor with contact details and supplied articles.
    Vendor(String, String, String, String, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Vendor
    Creates a vendor with an empty supplied-articles list.
    Vendor(String, String, String, String, String, double) - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Vendor
    Creates a vendor with minimum order value and no supplied-articles list.
    Vendor(String, String, String, String, String, List, double) - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Vendor
    Creates a vendor with supplied articles and minimum order value.
    VENDOR - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    VendorDialog - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.dialogs
     
    VendorDialog() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.dialogs.VendorDialog
     
    VendorGUI - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    VendorGUI with GUI-level caching. - Caches vendor list for faster reloads (TTL-based) - Invalidates cache on add/edit/delete/refresh
    VendorGUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.VendorGUI
     
    VendorManager - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
     
    VendorOrderLogging - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils
     
    VERIFIED - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    verifyRepository() - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.UpdateManager
    Verifies that the repository exists and is accessible.
    version() - Methode in Datensatzklasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.UpdateManager.ReleaseInfo
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente version zurück.
    VERSION - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.main.Main
    Application version string, used for display in the GUI and logging.
    VersionComparisonResult(String, String, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Konstruktor für Datensatzklasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.UpdateManager.VersionComparisonResult
    Erstellt eine Instanz einer Datensatzklasse VersionComparisonResult.
